name: Key Pair
description: AWS EC2 Key Pair for SSH access to instances

inputs.name: key_name
inputs.label: Key Pair Name
inputs.description: Name for the EC2 key pair

inputs.name: create_private_key
inputs.label: Auto-Generate Private Key
inputs.description: Let AWS generate the key pair (private key will be stored in Terraform state)

inputs.name: public_key
inputs.label: Public Key
inputs.description: SSH public key material (only needed if not auto-generating)
